task: Fix stale member budget allocation API responses by applying the effective_max_budget calculation (using enforce_member_spend_limits flag) in project_budget_router.py response builders.

key_reasoning.reason: Two sites in project_budget_router.py (_build_project_budget_response and list_project_budget_members) plus a call to SettingsService.get_enforce_member_spend_limits, spanning the API and Service layers. Self-contained within one router file.
API layer (router response projection) and Service layer (SettingsService call) — two layers with a simple established handoff. No persistence changes, no new layer coordination required.
